title: SkeelyZ's Ten Font
description: This Pack Changes The Games Font To Look  More "Block-ish".
body:
I Originally Got This Idea From [xllifi](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mc10), And I Wanted Make It "TEN FONT" Accurate Cause. Why NOT?

![Menu Screen + Essential Mod:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0d33ef70218c1810a93471588dc41d84484a084d.png)

![Options Screen:](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c9c27a54fbf2cd14c249d6f6de2f3b3fd242a5e.png)

Feel Free To Use The Pack For Your Own As Long As You Credit ME.
